case.title: CITIES SERVICE GAS PRODUCING COMPANY v. FEDERAL POWER

opinion.h: CITIES SERVICE GAS PRODUCING COMPANY v. FEDERAL POWER , 352 U.S. 911 (1956)
CITIES SERVICE GAS PRODUCING COMPANY, petitioner, v. FEDERAL POWER COMMISSION. No. 418.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Conrad C. Mount, O. R. Stites and Robert R. McCracken, for petitioner.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub, Messrs. Melvin Richter, Bernard Cedarbaum and Willard W. Gatchell, for respondent.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit.
Denied.[ Cities Service Gas Producing Company v. Federal Power 352 U.S. 911 (1956) ]
